[Calling write_report(title="Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="# Project Helios — Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)  
**Source:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28

| Patient | Age | Weight | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated Dose | Frequency | Next Dose | PK Clearance | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 months | 12.4 kg | 0.15 | 1.86 mg | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 months | 9.1 kg | 0.12 | 1.09 mg | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 months | 15.7 kg | 0.18 | 2.83 mg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick Take
- All three patients have active dosing schedules with upcoming doses between **2026-04-10** and **2026-04-14**.
- Two patients are on **q3w** dosing; one is on **q2w** dosing.
- No instability or toxicity flag is noted in the dosing config itself.
")]
